title: Field Rep Onboarding Guide — HCP Portal Ordering Module
markdown_content:
# HCP Portal Ordering Module — Field Rep Guide

## Overview

This guide covers the HCP portal ordering workflow for field representatives. Topics include initial setup, order entry, tracking, and escalation procedures.

## Prerequisites

- Active portal account provisioned by IT
- Completion of online ordering module training

## Ordering Workflow

1. Log in to the HCP portal.
2. Navigate to **Orders > New Order**.
3. Complete all required fields in the order form.
4. Submit for pharmacist review.

## Updated in This Version

- Step 2 now requires selecting the patient's insurance plan before proceeding to the order form.
- Pharmacist review turnaround target updated from 48h to 24h.
author: <documentation-specialist>
